Privacy Policy

Last updated: 2026

Lemowaves AI is built by Sam and designed with your privacy in mind.

  • Google Sign-In required. You must sign in with your Google account to use Lemowaves AI beyond the 2-message trial. We receive your name and profile picture only — we do not access your email content, contacts, or any other Google data.
  • Chat history is stored locally in your browser's localStorage on your device. It never leaves your device or gets sent to our servers.
  • Messages sent to the AI are processed through third-party AI providers (Groq, OpenRouter, Google Gemini, Together AI, Stability AI) to generate responses. These providers have their own privacy policies. We do not log or store your messages on our own servers.
  • Image generation & analysis. Image prompts are sent to Stability AI and Pollinations AI. Uploaded images are processed in your browser and sent to Google Gemini for analysis. Neither are stored on our servers.
  • No tracking. No analytics, no third-party trackers, no advertising cookies.
  • Data deletion. You can clear all your local data anytime by clearing your browser's localStorage for this site.
  • Age requirement. You must be 13 or older to use Lemowaves AI. By signing in, you confirm you meet this requirement.

Questions or concerns? Contact Sam, the creator of Lemowaves AI.

Terms of Service

Last updated: 2026

By using Lemowaves AI, you agree to these terms:

  • Sign-in requirement. A Google account is required after the 2-message free trial. By signing in, you agree to these terms and our Privacy Policy.
  • Free tier. Free users get 50 messages per day and up to 5 image generations per day. Limits reset every 24 hours.
  • Acceptable use. Do not use Lemowaves AI to generate harmful, illegal, abusive, defamatory, sexually explicit, or violent content. Do not attempt to bypass content filters, usage limits, or security measures. Violations may result in immediate and permanent access termination.
  • Content safety. Adult, explicit, nude, or illegal content generation is strictly prohibited and will be blocked. Attempts to bypass this filter are a violation of these terms.
  • Accuracy. The AI may make mistakes. Always verify important information — especially medical, legal, and financial advice — from authoritative sources.
  • Code responsibility. AI-generated code should be reviewed and tested before use in production environments. We are not responsible for bugs or issues.
  • Intellectual property. You retain ownership of content you create using Lemowaves AI. We claim no rights to your outputs.
  • Service changes. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the service at any time. We may update these terms — continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
  • Governing law. These terms are governed by the laws of India.

Disclaimer: Lemowaves AI is powered by third-party AI models (Groq, Google Gemini, OpenRouter, Together AI). Responses are generated automatically and may not always be accurate, current, or complete. Use at your own discretion.
